autoscaling.autoscalinggroup.networkinte: `NetworkInterfaceCountRequest` is a property of the `InstanceRequirements` property of the [AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup LaunchTemplateOverrides](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-autoscaling-autoscalinggroup-launchtemplateoverrides.html) property type that describes the minimum and maximum number of network interfaces for an instance type.

autoscaling.autoscalinggroup.networkinte.Description: The maximum number of network interfaces.
The minimum number of network interfaces.
